channel.title: Data Breach Alerts
channel.description: Automated feed of recent data breaches and ransomware attacks affecting 10,000+ people or involving sensitive data (SSN, health info, etc.)

item.title: Conrad Capital Management - Unknown
item.description:

Location: US

Data at Risk: Data exfiltrated
